name: combo-chen
description: Conductor for autonomous issue → PR pipelines: fixed roles, configurable agents.

scripts.slop:check: sg scan --rule .slop/rules/core-no-child-process.yml src/core --globs '!**/*.test.ts' --error && sg scan --rule .slop/rules/core-no-infra-import.yml src/core --globs '!**/*.test.ts' --error && sg scan --rule .slop/rules/no-duplicate-helpers.yml src --globs '!**/*.test.ts' --error && jscpd src --format typescript --ignore '**/*.test.ts' --threshold 2 --silent --no-colors --no-tips
scripts.slop:report: jscpd src --format typescript --ignore '**/*.test.ts' --silent --no-colors --no-tips; sg scan --rule .slop/rules/core-no-infra-verbs.yml src/core --globs '!**/*.test.ts' --warning; sg scan --rule .slop/rules/script-string-assertion.yml src --globs '**/*.test.ts' --warning
scripts.surface: sg outline --items structure --type function --view names src --globs '!**/*.test.ts'
